subcodes.first_line: O divine physician! The weak body of the world is afflicted with myriad chronic and deadly diseases, and humanity's ailing existence [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: ای طبیب روحانی جسم ضعیف عالم بصد هزار امراض مزمنه مهلکه گرفتار و وجود علیل آدم
subcodes.subjects: @health and healing; material and spiritual healing, @present and future calamities; war; universal convulsion, @knowledge; recognition of God, @spiritual transformation, @love of God, @divine grace, bounty, confirmations; spiritual capacity
